features.name: Interactive Chat Mockup
features.description: Automated typing and cycling chat scenarios to demonstrate AI capabilities.

features.name: Snappy Dark Mode
features.description: Instant theme switching using transition suppression hack and localStorage persistence.

features.name: Feature Grid
features.description: Uniform height cards using CSS grid auto-rows-fr.

coding_conventions: Dark Mode uses .dark class on <html> root
Theme toggle uses disable-transitions class to prevent lag
Standardized surface color tokens (50-950) in global.css
business_rules: Bot responses are counted for pricing, staff messages are not.
Free trial requires no credit card.
